title: Start
overview: Ryōta Sakamoto is ranked #10 worldwide in Btooom!, an online game where players kill each other with bombs. After a game one day, he mysteriously awakes in a real life version of the game.

title: The Bloodstained High School Girl
overview: A typical high school girl, betrayed by her neighbors, a forced player in the game of Btooom!, betrayed by the group she teamed up with. All men are scum.

title: Survival
overview: While chasing after the mysterious girl, Ryota runs into Taira Kiyoshi who helps fill in the blanks in his memory.

title: Best in the World
overview: Kira Kosuke is a disturbed child, but when on the island his true nature can finally come out, unchecked. That is until he faces the best Btooom! player in Japan.

title: Attack
overview: A pantless corpse floats by Taira and Sakamoto while they are eating lunch. When Sakamoto leaves to investigate he finds a gruesome scene and a familiar figure.

title: Night of Sacrifice
overview: In the moment of danger, trust issues start to show between Taira and Sakamoto. Sakamoto wants to save everyone especially the girl who just tried to kill him.

title: Virtual Bride
overview: Miyamoto, the mercenary, has found Sakamoto and his team. This dangerous player will do anything it takes to win.

title: White Ghost
overview: As Sakamoto and Himiko try to rest for the night, Himiko wrestles with the idea of telling Sakamoto her true identity, but before she can do anything she is visited by a “ghost”.

title: The Strongest Player
overview: A new player has joined Sakamoto's team, but he carries a dark secret. Before the team could dive deeper into the new players past, a food drop overhead brings many players out of hiding.

title: High Level
overview: It seems the players on the island are interconnected in more ways than one. While Sakamoto mulls over this new information, the good doctor begins his end game.

title: Revival
overview: With Ryouta out of the way, Himiko will be an easy target for Date, but Shiki has other plans for the doctor.

title: Bonds
overview: Taira has lost it and is attacking his friends. Ryouta doesn't want to fight but this time he truly might not have a choice.
